ANGLE - OTHER STUDENTS 190

INT. CABIN - LIVING ROOM - LATER SAME NIGHT 203

It’s dark. Frank is doing something with his hands just

FRANK (V.0.)
I had to get a message to Folice
Squad. This thing was turning
into more than I could handle
by myself. No phone and miles from

civilization. Things looked bleaker
than the ‘93 Mets.

Now we see he’s been tying a message on the leg of a
pigeon. He hears someone coming, quickly tosses the
pigeon over his shoulder at the open window. Bad move.
The pigeon hits the-window fan in the upper pane.
Feathers swirl like a blizzard around Prank‘s
incredulous face. .
